notes: Phase 6 (Naxxramas). Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WoW Classic Era Hunter Dps gear guide. Rings/Trinkets: the source lists 2-4 ranked options in one row (you equip two) — split here into two named slots, top pick in slot 1; combined source text kept for both. Classic Era predates gem sockets entirely (introduced in Cataclysm) — no gems section applies.

items.name: Cryptstalker Spaulders
items.source: Reward from the quest The Savior of Kalimdor which you get from the eye that C'Thun drops in AQ40

items.name: Cryptstalker Wristguards
items.source: Faerlina, Anub'Rekhan, and Gluth in Naxxramas
